body_preview: - Assessment self-test: "`state failures tools` returned 'no parseable events found at .yoyo/state/events.jsonl' despite `state tail` working" - Source analysis: `handle_tool_failures` (line 822) uses `read_events_lenient` to parse events, while `state tail` (line 440) uses `read_tail` which reads raw lines without JSON parsing. title: Fix `state failures tools` returning "no parseable events" when events exist
